raw_responses.title: Detecting LLM Fact-conflicting Hallucinations Enhanced by Temporal-logic-based Reasoning (Drowzee)
raw_responses.snippet: Framework called Drowzee uses temporal logic to identify fact-conflicting hallucinations in LLMs; generates complex test cases with intricate temporal features.

raw_responses.title: Large Language Models Hallucination: A Comprehensive Survey
raw_responses.snippet: Method-oriented taxonomy of mitigation organizing 300+ studies into Training/Architectural/Prompt/Post-Generation QC/Interpretability/Agent-Orchestration categories.

raw_responses.title: A Survey on Hallucination in LLMs: Definitions, Detection, and Mitigation
raw_responses.snippet: Recent survey covering detection methods and mitigation strategies; treats methods as parallel/alternative.

raw_responses.title: Edinburgh NLP awesome-hallucination-detection (repo of papers)
raw_responses.snippet: Curated list of hallucination-detection papers across approaches.

raw_responses.title: From Illusion to Insight: Taxonomic Survey of Hallucination Mitigation Techniques in LLMs
raw_responses.snippet: Taxonomic survey of mitigation; multi-stage frameworks discussed.

raw_responses.title: Forensic entomology (Wikipedia)

raw_responses.title: FlyTracks and SmellPrints: Necrophagous Insect Behavior + VOCs (ACS Omega 2025)
